text: A street scene in an urban area. A statue of a man stands on a pedestal inside a white, classical-style gazebo structure. The gazebo is surrounded by a low white railing. Two people are walking on the sidewalk in the foreground: one wearing a plaid shirt and a backpack, and another wearing a light blue uniform and a cap. A yellow parking sign (P) is visible near the left side of the gazebo. The background features lush green trees, utility poles, and buildings.
label: Image
